name: @sigalswap/sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for SigalSwap - Privacy-preserving AMM on Aztec
author: SigalSwap LLC

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/artifacts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const skip=/^(abusive_pair|flash_borrower|mock_factory|mock_pair_v2)-/;for(const f of fs.readdirSync('src/artifacts').filter(x=>x.endsWith('.json')&&!skip.test(x))){fs.copyFileSync('src/artifacts/'+f,'dist/artifacts/'+f);}"
scripts.test:e2e: node --import tsx/esm --test --test-concurrency=1 src/e2e/e2e.test.ts src/e2e/e2e-negative.test.ts src/e2e/e2e-properties.test.ts src/e2e/e2e-events-governance.test.ts src/e2e/e2e-coverage-additions.test.ts
scripts.codegen: aztec codegen --force ../../protocol/periphery/target -o src/artifacts && aztec codegen --force ../../protocol/factory/target -o src/artifacts && aztec codegen --force ../../protocol/core/target -o src/artifacts && aztec codegen --force ../../protocol/lp-token/target -o src/artifacts && aztec codegen --force ../../protocol/test-contracts/flash-borrower/target -o src/artifacts && aztec codegen --force ../../protocol/test-contracts/mock-pair-v2/target -o src/artifacts && aztec codegen --force ../../protocol/test-contracts/abusive-pair/target -o src/artifacts && aztec codegen --force ../../protocol/test-contracts/mock-factory/target -o src/artifacts
